name: skill-eval
description: Evaluate any Claude Code skill on two layers: (1) static quality scoring derived from claude-code plugin conventions (frontmatter validity, body length, progressive disclosure, description triggerability) and (2) dynamic A/B benchmarking that runs the same prompts in parallel subagents with-skill vs without-skill and compares pass rate, time, and tokens. Produces a markdown report plus benchmark.json. Ships with a sibling `skill-eval-viewer` skill that renders the workspace into a designed HTML report (Field Audit theme: Fraunces display + bone paper + vermillion accent) and can serve it on http://127.0.0.1:PORT/.
